vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The biome is in a state of severe degradation. The registry indicates four distinct plant entities (P1-P4), but the visual evidence confirms only a single, struggling sprout in P3 and empty, dark soil in the remaining pots.

plant_audit.P1: No visible foliage or stem structure.
plant_audit.P2: No visible foliage or stem structure.
plant_audit.P3: Single green sprout visible; appears to be the only remaining biological occupant.
plant_audit.P4: No visible foliage or stem structure.

vision_report.biome_observations: Soil appears dark and potentially waterlogged or devoid of organic life. No fungal blooms or secondary weeds detected. The white rabbit anchor is present in P3, confirming the scale and location.
vision_report.temporal_deltas: From EARLIEST to CURRENT, there has been no growth or recovery. The environment remains static and largely barren, suggesting a failure of the initial planting or a catastrophic loss of the specimens.
vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is failing. The lack of foliage in P1, P2, and P4 indicates total specimen loss. The single sprout in P3 is the only indicator of life, though its long-term viability is questionable given the lack of surrounding growth.
vision_report.anomalies: None detected; the primary anomaly is the absence of the expected botanical inventory.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a near-total collapse of the botanical collection. Only one small sprout remains in the P3 pot alongside the white rabbit anchor. The other pots (P1, P2, P4) are devoid of plant matter, indicating a systemic failure of the biome. The lighting conditions are insufficient to support recovery, and the soil appears stagnant.
